name: solana-coralos
description: Solana × CoralOS starter kit for agents that earn — fork deliverService() to sell your own service, settled on-chain through a devnet escrow. The World Cup oracle is the default demo (npm run dev).

scripts.setup: npm install --no-audit --no-fund && npm install --prefix scripts --no-audit --no-fund && node scripts/setup.js
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build:agents
scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @pay/agent-runtime && npm run build -w @pay/harness-runtime && npm run build -w @pay/payment-runtime && npm run build -w @pay/solana-agent-tools
scripts.build:agents: npm run build -w buyer-agent && npm run build -w seller-agent && npm run build -w verifier-agent
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:packages && npm run typecheck:packages && npm run typecheck:examples && npm run typecheck:agents
scripts.typecheck:packages: npm run typecheck -w @pay/agent-runtime && npm run typecheck -w @pay/harness-runtime && npm run typecheck -w @pay/payment-runtime && npm run typecheck -w @pay/solana-agent-tools
scripts.typecheck:examples: npm run typecheck -w @pay/example-txodds && npm run typecheck -w txodds-feed
scripts.typecheck:agents: npm run typecheck -w buyer-agent && npm run typecheck -w seller-agent && npm run typecheck -w verifier-agent
scripts.test: npm run build:packages && npm run test:packages && npm run test:examples && npm run test:agents
scripts.test:packages: npm test -w @pay/agent-runtime && npm test -w @pay/harness-runtime && npm test -w @pay/payment-runtime && npm test -w @pay/solana-agent-tools
scripts.test:agents: npm test -w buyer-agent && npm test -w seller-agent && npm test -w verifier-agent
